Identifying your niche
Self-assessment
Selecting the RIGHT niche is a critical first decision to make before you start building
your list. These questions will help you start thinking about the type of niche that’s best
suited to YOU!
1. What are your core passions and interests? (i.e. helping people, mountain
biking, fly fishing, etc.)
